hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams apply KYC rules consistently by automating onboarding and review workflows while preserving audit-ready evidence and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYC reviews depend on manual rule interpretation
problem_description: Compliance teams often must interpret and apply KYC policies manually across multiple provider outputs. This creates inconsistent onboarding decisions, slows review cycles and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible compliance oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs with internal policies to automate KYC review routing, capture decision logs and preserve audit evidence within one cohesive compliance workflow for VASP operations.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY applies KYC and KYB provider outputs through configurable rules to route reviews, open cases, record decisions and preserve audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral control layer that turns fragmented KYC outputs into structured workflows, consistent decisions, case history and audit evidence for compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP operations with governed onboarding workflows, preserving audit-ready evidence and supporting scalable deployment for consistent compliance decisions.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY apply KYC rules across onboarding workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC checks route into compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports KYC decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration models for KYC rule automation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and audit evidence.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY apply KYC rules workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal KYC rules to provider outputs, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and updates workflows consistently across customer onboarding and ongoing monitoring.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case records and provider outputs to create audit-ready evidence supporting every compliance action, review and regulatory report.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above current KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers and connects their results without replacing or duplicating existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current KYC or onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or onboarding providers but orchestrates their outputs into a controlled, explainable, and auditable compliance workflow.
final_title: Apply KYC rules consistently across onboarding
final_description: Review how SFTY structures KYC rules, risk-based routing and case management into a controlled compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
